cards.goal: Starting without pressure

cards.title: Today's Focus
paragraphs: Starting without pressure
cards.highlight:
Sit quietly for 1 minute.
Notice your breath.

cards.title: Guided Audio
cards.description: Listen whenever you are ready for today’s guided reflection.

cards.title: Today's Practice
instructions: Sit quietly for 1 minute.
Notice your breath.
cards.whyThisWorks: Starting without pressure

cards.prompt: What made me start today?
cards.helperText: A few honest words are enough.
cards.followUpPrompt: What do you want to remember tomorrow?

cards.secondaryMessage: Return tomorrow when you feel ready.
